a:T39376,<div class="question">
<p>The picture shows lentils sprouts growing towards a light source from the left.</p>
<p style="text-align:center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align:center;">[Source: Russell Neches, Lentil sprouts reaching for the sun [image online] Available at <a href="https://www.flickr.com/photos/rneches/2081938105/">https://www.flickr.com/photos/rneches/2081938105/</a> This file is licensed under <br/>the Creative Commons Attribution 2.0 Generic (CC BY 2.0)<br/><a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0/">https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0/</a>.]</p>
<p style="text-align:left;"> </p>
<p style="text-align:left;">How has this response been brought about?</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">A. A higher concentration of auxins on the light side caused faster photosynthesis.</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">B. A higher concentration of auxins on the shaded side caused faster meiosis.</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">C. A higher concentration of auxins on the shaded side caused faster cell elongation.</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">D. A higher concentration of chloroplasts on the light side allowed for more photosynthesis.</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/9/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","9"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.HL.TZ2.33"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","9-3-growth-in-plants"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>C</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
